underlying_goal: Update CLAUDE.md with new learnings about opaque libraries and fix permissions so edits to .claude folder work in auto-approve mode
friction_detail: Edit tool was repeatedly denied for ~/.claude/ files due to permission scope issues, requiring workarounds via Bash and jq.
brief_summary: User wanted to append learnings to CLAUDE.md and fix auto-approve permissions for the .claude folder; both were achieved despite repeated permission denials requiring workarounds.
